rationale: No headline this cycle directly affects Portugal; Middle East tensions remain background noise with minor indirect energy price implications. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Israel expands military control; Beirut strikes continue; Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Continued Middle East instability poses a mild indirect risk to energy prices in Portugal, but no confirmed supply disruption or price spike has occurred.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A tourist train accident in southern Spain (Cártama) injured 17 people — geographically close to Portugal and relevant to the Iberian tourism economy, though impact is minor.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A large UK-Japan trade deal has negligible direct impact on Portugal but signals continued global trade activity relevant to EU economic context.
